name: parallel-workspace-orchestrator
description: CLI for orchestrating batched parallel coding-agent workspaces with git worktrees, resumable state, logs, and merge/test gating.

scripts.demo: npm run demo:setup && tsx src/cli.ts run examples/plan.yaml --repo .demo/sample-repo --agent dry-run --new-run
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run demo && npm run demo:status && npm run demo:command && npm run demo:command:status

author: Mohit Bapatla
